topFindings.finding: Low evidence coverage (0% of proposals cite evidence)
topFindings.reason: Every proposal should cite supporting evidence per factory contract.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Ensure claim/relationship builders attach evidence_refs from the evidence packet.

topFindings.reason: Fracture diagnoses require classification when one exists clinically.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Link has_classification and has_grade edges to a classification system.

topFindings.finding: 3 high-risk relationships lack approved review status
topFindings.reason: High-risk predicates require human review before publication.

topFindings.reason: Draft claims cannot be consumed as verified educational content.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Route claims through human review queue before publication.

topFindings.finding: Insufficient evidence support on claim proposals
topFindings.reason: Every claim should cite supporting evidence.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Attach evidence_refs from evidence packet to each claim proposal.

topFindings.evidence: 0 decision points with safetyCriticality=high or urgency=emergent
topFindings.reason: Trauma neighborhoods require emergency escalation pathways.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add emergency_escalation decision point for compartment syndrome, open fracture, etc.

topFindings.finding: Primary entity missing metadata: curriculum_tags, board_relevance
topFindings.evidence: Entity tibial-shaft-fracture metadata keys: slug, pilot, verified, curated_at, description, clinical_kind, staging_apply, curation_route, curation_rules, curation_scores, factory_version, maturity_target, staging_reviewer, applied_by_script, review_packet_key, review_packet_label, clinical_verification, _provenance_fingerprint
topFindings.reason: Primary condition entities require educational and curriculum metadata.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Run metadata-builder to populate clinical_kind, curriculum_tags, board_relevance.

topFindings.evidence: asset-linker (F), relationship-builder (D), metadata-builder (F), duplicate-detector (F), quality-scorer (F), conflict-resolver (F), publication-validator (F)
topFindings.reason: Low-grading agents reduce neighborhood quality and increase review burden.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Review agent report cards and address weaknesses per agent.

topFindings.finding: Insufficient primary-entity claims for learning progression
topFindings.reason: Residents need a critical mass of claims to build mental models.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Add L1–L3 claims covering diagnosis, classification, treatment, and complications.

topFindings.reason: Same anatomical/clinical concepts should use shared canonical slugs across neighborhoods.
topFindings.suggestedFix: Consolidate to shared anatomy hubs; reference rather than recreate entities.
